sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';

/**
 * EMS Logo — Trendy event ticket design with vibrant gradient.
 * Features a stylized ticket with modern geometric elements representing events and connectivity.
 */
export default function OrganizoLogo({ className = '', size = 32 }) {
  const uniqueId = `ticketGradient-${Math.random()}`;
  const accentId = `accentGradient-${Math.random()}`;
  
  return (
    <svg
      className={className}
      width={size}
      height={size}
      viewBox="0 0 48 48"
      fill="none"
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      aria-hidden="true"
    >
      <defs>
        {/* Main gradient - purple to indigo */}
        <linearGradient id={uniqueId} x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#7c3aed" />
          <stop offset="50%" stopColor="#8b5cf6" />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#a855f7" />
        </linearGradient>
        {/* Accent gradient for details */}
        <linearGradient id={accentId} x1="0%" y1="100%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#ec4899" />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#f43f5e" />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>

      {/* Main ticket body - rounded rectangle */}
      <rect
        x="6"
        y="8"
        width="36"
        height="32"
        rx="4"
        ry="4"
        fill={`url(#${uniqueId})`}
        style={{ filter: 'drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.3))' }}
      />

      {/* Perforated line (ticket tear-off line) */}
      <line
        x1="24"
        y1="8"
        x2="24"
        y2="40"
        stroke="white"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeDasharray="4,3"
        opacity="0.6"
      />

      {/* Left ticket section - event info area */}
      <rect
        x="8"
        y="10"
        width="14"
        height="28"
        fill="none"
        stroke="white"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        opacity="0.3"
        rx="2"
      />

      {/* Top decorative circle - event indicator */}
      <circle cx="15" cy="15" r="3" fill="white" opacity="0.9" />

      {/* Ticket number lines (text representation) */}
      <line x1="9" y1="23" x2="21" y2="23" stroke="white" strokeWidth="1.2" opacity="0.7" />
      <line x1="9" y1="28" x2="21" y2="28" stroke="white" strokeWidth="1.2" opacity="0.6" />
      <line x1="9" y1="33" x2="17" y2="33" stroke="white" strokeWidth="1.2" opacity="0.5" />

      {/* Right section - accent design */}
      {/* Stylized play button / ticket check mark */}
      <path
        d="M30 18L36 22.5L30 27Z"
        fill={`url(#${accentId})`}
        opacity="0.95"
      />

      {/* Circular halo for emphasis */}
      <circle
        cx="33"
        cy="22.5"
        r="7"
        fill="none"
        stroke="white"
        strokeWidth="1.5"
        opacity="0.4"
      />

      {/* Decorative accents - dots in corners */}
      <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="1.2" fill="white" opacity="0.7" />
      <circle cx="38" cy="38" r="1.2" fill="white" opacity="0.7" />
    </svg>
  );
}
